form.formComment: Made debut this course and distance and immediately off the mark, scoring a 16 length win in 29.88. Has returned in winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won comfortably by 4.5 lengths at this track (29.61) beating Just A Menace in a Maiden on April 8. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Back in top order and looks the one to beat.

form.formComment: Made an eye-catching debut when rocketed out of the boxes with a slick early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (29.97) at this track. Shows promise but looks tested this line-up.
